import React from 'react'; import { Link, useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Award, RotateCcw, Share2, BookOpen, Target } from 'lucide-react'; const ScenarioCompletion: React.FC = () => { const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>(); const scenario = { _id: '1', title: 'The Inventory That Changed Everything', subtitle: 'First-Time Bail Application – Theft Offense', description: 'A sales executive is accused of theft after a valuable laptop goes missing during an inventory check.', rating: 4.7, reviewCount: 32, skillFocus: [ 'Client Interviewing', 'Legal Research', 'Oral Advocacy', 'Case Preparation', 'Critical Thinking', 'Evidence Analysis' ] }; // Mock performance data const performanceData = { clientInterview: 90, evidenceAnalysis: 85, legalResearch: 80, argumentation: 88, courtroomPresence: 75 }; const getPerformanceColor = (score: number) => { if (score >= 90) return 'text-green-600'; if (score >= 80) return 'text-blue-600'; if (score >= 70) return 'text-yellow-600'; return 'text-red-600'; }; const getPerformanceBg = (score: number) => { if (score >= 90) return 'bg-green-100'; if (score >= 80) return 'bg-blue-100'; if (score >= 70) return 'bg-yellow-100'; return 'bg-red-100'; }; return (
Back to All Scenarios
Mission Complete

Congratulations, Counsel!

You've successfully completed the "{scenario.title}" legal scenario.

{scenario.rating}
{[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => ( ))}
({scenario.reviewCount} reviews)
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Performance Summary */}

Performance Summary

{Object.entries(performanceData).map(([skill, score]) => (
{skill.replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1').trim()}
= 90 ? 'bg-green-600' : score >= 80 ? 'bg-blue-600' : score >= 70 ? 'bg-yellow-600' : 'bg-red-600' }`} style={{ width: `${score}%` }} >
{score}%
))}

Key Insights

  • Your analysis of the digital inventory logs was crucial in identifying internal fraud
  • Effective use of bail provisions under CrPC demonstrated strong legal knowledge
  • Client interview skills helped uncover key exculpatory evidence
  • Consider working on courtroom presence for more persuasive advocacy
{/* Skill Development */}

Skill Development

{scenario.skillFocus.map((skill, index) => (
{skill}
{performanceData[skill.replace(/ /g, '') as keyof typeof performanceData] || 75}%
))}
{/* Sidebar */}
{/* Next Steps */}

Next Steps

{/* Certificate */}

Certificate Earned

You've demonstrated proficiency in criminal law advocacy and bail procedures.

{/* Feedback */}

Provide Feedback

Help us improve by sharing your experience with this scenario.

); }; export default ScenarioCompletion;
